title: Upon Jolly And Jilly. Epig.
content:
Jolly and Jilly bite and scratch all day,
    But yet get children (as the neighbours say).
    The reason is: though all the day they fight,
    They cling and close some minutes of the night.
meaning:
"Upon Jolly And Jilly. Epig." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
